decision: Use https://www.ezhalhe-sa.com as the single intended production origin
rationale: The live host already consolidates to www and the owner approved one-domain canonicalization
approval_status: Approved principle; implementation pending baseline review

decision: Preserve every existing production URL unless an exact equivalent and backlink/ranking evidence justify a change
rationale: Protect accumulated relevance history and external-link equity

decision: Block URL changes while Search Console and backlink evidence is unavailable
rationale: The authenticated account lacks property access and no backlink export is present

decision: Any approved content migration must use one direct permanent redirect to the exact equivalent without a chain
rationale: Protect crawl efficiency and relevance; platform host-level 308 behavior is documented separately

decision: Future sitemap must contain only canonical indexable final-200 URLs and accurate verifiable lastmod values
rationale: Current sitemap contains duplicates redirects and final 404 URLs

decision: Do not delete pages or content without explicit owner approval
rationale: Project preservation rule and ranking-risk control

decision: Do not use FAQPage schema; LocalBusiness requires verified real-world location evidence
rationale: Project schema rules and accuracy requirements

decision: Use only #15B5B0 #0D2224 #3BBBC2 #FFFFFF and #555555 with no additions or substitutions
Deploy redirects canonicals robots sitemap headers and related links atomically after staging validation
rationale: Prevent partial crawl/indexing behavior and temporary errors

decision: Freeze structural changes and prepare a corrective patch if unexpected indexing canonical ranking or crawl issues appear
